questions.question: A basketball team scored $48$ points in a game. Is $48$ divisible by $3$?
A tennis player won $75$ games in a tournament. Is $75$ divisible by $5$?
A sprinter ran $90$ meters in a race. What is the remainder when $90$ is divided by $9$?
A golfer played $120$ holes in a tournament. Is $120$ divisible by $10$?
A marathon runner ran $27$ kilometers in a race. What is the remainder when $27$ is divided by $3$?
A gymnast performed $36$ routines in a competition. Is $36$ divisible by $2$?
A volleyball team won $99$ games in a season. What is the remainder when $99$ is divided by $9$?
A cyclist rode $45$ kilometers in a ride. Is $45$ divisible by $5$?

A swimmer completed $240$ laps in a pool. Perform long division to find the quotient and remainder when $240$ is divided by $16$. Express your answer in the form $q \cdot d + r$, where $q$ is the quotient, $d$ is the divisor, and $r$ is the remainder.

A triathlete ran $180$ kilometers, cycled $90$ kilometers, and swam $45$ kilometers in a competition. What is the remainder when the total distance traveled ($180 + 90 + 45$) is divided by $9$? Show all work and express your answer as a numerical value.

teacher_rules: Tip 1: Encourage students to use divisibility rules to simplify calculations.
Tip 2: Remind students to check their work by multiplying the quotient by the divisor and adding the remainder.
Tip 3: Emphasize the importance of labeling all parts of the division equation.
